Member of Parliament for Maidstone and Malling

Helen on Twitter
Helen on Instagram

My Plan

  • Protecting our green spaces from inappropriate housing developments and safeguarding our precious environment.

  • Improving our NHS, making appointments with GPs and dentists easier, and cutting waiting times at hospitals.

  • Investing in schools and ensuring funding for a first-class education for all our children.

  • Working with Kent Police to increase uniformed presence and reduce crime and anti-social behaviour in our communities.

  • Supporting local businesses to help them flourish, and create apprenticeships and jobs for local people.

  • Battling for better road, rail and bus transport.

View the activity map

Am I your MP?

Helen Grant Conservative Candidate for Maidstone and Malling
